item.title: Uncanny Valley: AI Researchers’ Resignations, Bots Hiring Humans, Evie Magazine’s Party
item.description: This episode of Uncanny Valley covers the people resigning from AI companies and the humans getting hired by AI agents. Plus, we attend a soiree throw...

item.title: The US Had a Big Battery Boom Last Year
item.description: Despite Donald Trump’s unrelenting attacks on renewable energy, there’s a quiet revolution happening on US grids.

item.title: Lamborghini is the Latest Automaker to Pull the Plug on Luxury EVs
item.description: The CEO of the supercar company says demand for high-end full electric cars is “almost zero.” Could this mean Ferrari's Luce will be dead on arrival?

item.title: Best Puffer Jacket (2026): Patagonia, Arc’teryx, REI
item.description: Our favorite down puffer jackets will keep you warm in the backcountry and around town.

item.title: The Best iPad to Buy (and Some to Avoid) in 2026
item.description: We break down the current iPad lineup to help you figure out which of Apple’s tablets is best for you.
